content: Claude RAG System Test Document This document is designed to test the Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system functionality. The RAG system combines several key components: 1. Document processing and chunking 2. Vector embeddings using sentence transformers 3. Similarity search for semantic matching 4. Keyword-based fallback search Key Features to Test: - Document upload and processing - Semantic similarity search - Keyword matching capabilities - Chunk retrieval and ranking Technical Implementation: The system uses SentenceTransformer models for embedding generation, FAISS for vector indexing, and SQLite for document storage. The enhanced engine provides both semantic and keyword search capabilities. Test Queries: This document should be found when searching for terms like RAG system, document processing, embedding, similarity search, or Claude.
